title: Appliances, Functions, Storage, and Cloud Connectivity · Incident Case: Net Nas San
summary: Design service paths across physical and virtual devices, private cloud networks, public services, and storage. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net nas san increment in a labeled hybrid-service path. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare NAS and SAN access models, protocols, traffic patterns, redundancy, and use cases.
Compare router, switch, firewall, access point, controller, proxy, load balancer, IDS, and IPS forwarding or inspection roles.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
